  3. Lea Jansen

United States

Lea Jansen

Competitive singles patterns and disciplined pressure

Biography

Lea Jansen grew up in Washington with a tennis background and later became known for competitive singles patterns and a fiery on-court presence. Her matches are useful for learning patience under pressure, serve-return discipline, and when to stay in a rally rather than force a low-percentage attack.

Major skills

Singles rally toleranceServe-return pressurePattern disciplineMental toughnessCounter attacks

Career notes

  • PPA profile lists strong singles results and active tour presence.
  • Pickleball.com notes her Washington tennis background and collegiate success.
  • Known for intensity and singles competitiveness.

Events

SinglesWomen’s doublesMixed doubles spot starts

Paddle / sponsor line

Sponsored equipment varies by season

What to study

Study how she extends points without losing attack intent.
